rulings.Case Title: FERDINAND WILLIAM BISHOP VS. ADVOCATE MINES LTD. et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 13, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Hill Brothers Chemical Company¿s motion for summary judgment is off calendar. Defendant was dismissed December 29. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID J. PALOMARES VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 13, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication: hearing required. The parties should be prepared to argue why or why not plaintiff needs to present evidence of his exposure to a Paco product in order to defeat the motion. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ERNEST STONE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 13, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Defendant The W.W. Henry Co.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant¿s responses to General Order 129 interrogatories and Eugene Stone¿s declaration create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing cutback adhesive attributable to defendant. The objections to Mr. Stone¿s declaration are overruled. = (220/HEK)
